programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: In Madison, Satu, Knox and Gerbert arrive at the Bishop house to find that Matthew and Diana have disappeared; Matthew and Diana arrive in Elizabethan London and are confronted by a face from Matthew's past.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: As she continues her search for a mentor, Diana meets wealthy alchemist Mary Sidney; London's vampire ruler demands fealty from Diana and Matthew as he is unnerved by their sudden arrival in the City.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: In the present day, Domenico finds a body in Oxford; Em practices higher magic to reach Diana's mother; in 1590, Matthew and Diana explore John Dee's library in search of the Book of Life; they later meet with Queen Elizabeth.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Marcus tracks down evidence of Matthew and Diana's journey to 1590 and is charmed in the process; Gerbert and Knox scheme together; Sophie goes into labor; Em secretly continues higher magic in spite of Sarah's worries.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew and Diana arrive in France to see Matthew's dead father; Matthew and Diana face Philippe, and he has a revelation for Diana.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Philippe provokes Matthew and pushes him to reveal his blood rage to Diana; Diana learns of the prophecy which predicted her arrival; Matthew tells Diana how Philippe died; Diana and Matthew are married.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew and Diana arrive in Bohemia to search for the Book of Life; they meet Emperor Rudolf II, who immediately expresses a lascivious interest in Diana; Matthew is pushed to the edge.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew worries that the Book of Life is making Diana ill; back in present day, Marcus isn't ready to give up on Phoebe and makes an impassioned plea; Knox threatens Sophie and Nathaniel's baby.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Matthew is forced to account for his disruptive visit to Bohemia; Matthew and Diana reach a new level of intimacy.

programme.title: A Discovery of Witches
programme.desc: Diana makes plans to complete her training with Goody Alsop and perfect the ninth magical knot in order to return home; surprise encounters ensue.

programme.title: Boys from County Hell
programme.desc: Some hardy road workers, led by a bickering father and son, must survive the night when they accidentally awaken an ancient Irish vampire.

programme.title: Blood Relatives
programme.desc: Francis is a 115-year-old Yiddish vampire who roams the American backroads in his beat-up muscle car, keeping to himself, and liking it that way. One day, he meets a feisty teenager who claims she's his daughter, and she has the fangs to prove it.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Neurosurgeon Rowan Fielding has a problem -- when she gets mad, she kills with her mind; her search for answers sends her toward her secretive biological family; in New Orleans, Deirdre Mayfair is desperate to escape from her aunt's oppressive house.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Wracked with grief over Ellie's death, Rowan is out of control and unfit to perform surgeries; her paranoia that someone is following her is proven true; in New Orleans, Deirdre and her mysterious companion Lasher work together to draw Rowan home.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Deirdre's grisly death, Rowan searches for safety in a strange city; Sip provides Rowan with a safe house while he investigates Deirdre's murder; Lasher makes contact with Rowan, but not in the way one might expect.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: At Deirdre's funeral, Rowan is plunged into the world of the infamous Mayfair family; Uncle Cortland and Aunt Carlotta present diverging views on Lasher; Rowan must choose whom to trust and face the dire consequences; Sip identifies Deirdre's killer.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Trapped in the First Street House, Rowan and Sip must confront its many mysteries in order to escape; Rowan grapples with an inconceivable offer; Sip's sister Odette makes a horrifying discovery.

programme.desc: Desperate to relinquish Lasher, Rowan reaches out to her extended Mayfair family for help; Rowan must trust their unique process, a sacred ritual; Sip's search for answers takes him back to the Talamasca.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan makes a shocking discovery but has to deal with it alone; a tragic event brings Rowan closer to the Mayfairs -- and Lasher; Sip falls deeper down the rabbit hole of the key necklace.

programme.title: Mayfair Witches
programme.desc: Rowan inadvertently discovers her role in a prophecy that's held the Mayfair family for generations; Sip's investigation reaches its conclusion, uncovering secrets that could tarnish both Rowan's family and his role in the Talamasca.
